title: arenaria obtusiflora subsp. ciliaris
intro: Arenaria obtusiflora subsp. ciliaris, also known as the hairy sandwort, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
